title: orthosiphon wulfenioides
intro: Orthosiphon wulfenioides, also known as Kuding, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, as well as its ability to help lower blood pressure and improve kidney function. The health benefits of Orthosiphon wulfenioides include reducing the risk of kidney stones and improving urinary tract health, as well as its potential use as a natural remedy for hypertension and urinary incontinence. Orthosiphon wulfenioides is often prepared as a tea or infusion, with herbal preparations typically involving the leaves and stems of the plant being steeped in hot water to create a medicinal beverage.
